20.reason: Error: Should check if stack is empty (isEmpty) instead of full. Using FULLS causes incorrect error detection for pop operations.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: Should check if stack is empty (isEmpty) instead of full. Using FULLS causes incorrect error detection for pop operations.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  Error: Should check if stack is empty (isEmpty) before popping, not if it's full. This condition will never be true when the stack is empty, so it won't print "error" on an empty pop.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: Should check if stack is empty (EMPTYS) instead of full for pop operation. Using FULLS leads to out-of-bounds access when stack is empty.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  pop operation should check if stack is empty, not if full
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Logical error: pop operation should check if the stack is empty using EMPTYS(top), not FULLS(top)
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  Logical error: The pop operation should check if the stack is empty using EMPTYS(top) == 1. Checking FULLS here incorrectly triggers an error when the stack is full instead of empty.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Incorrect condition: should check if stack is empty (EMPTYS), not full, before popping]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The condition checks for full stack instead of empty stack. It should use EMPTYS(top) to detect underflow during pop.]

54.reason: Compilation error: function 'pop' is called before its definition/declaration, causing an implicit declaration error in C99 and later standards.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Compilation error: function 'pop' is called before its definition/declaration, causing an implicit declaration error in C99 and later standards.
